intro: This archive collects ten reports from April 12–17, 2026, detailing activity targeting critical infrastructure. The threat actor CyberAv3ngers was prominently observed in these incidents. The reporting indicates a concentration of attacks within the United states, focusing on the critical-infrastructure, energy, manufacturing, utilities, and water sectors. The severity of the documented threats varied, with a mix of four high, two critical, one medium, and three informational alerts characterizing the period's activity.
